attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
*
FROM
(
SELECT
BATCH_ID                      	,
INVOICE_TO_CONTACT_LAST_NAME  	,
INVOICE_TO_CONTACT_EMAIL      	,
INVOICE_TO_CONTACT_STATUS_CODE	,
SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID            	,
SHIP_TO_CONTACT_FIRST_NAME    	,
SHIP_TO_CONTACT_LAST_NAME     	,
SHIP_TO_CONTACT_EMAIL         	,
SHIP_TO_CONTACT_STATUS_CODE   	,
CUSTOMER_ID                   	,
CUSTOMER_NUMBER               	,
PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM            	,
ORDER_NUMBER                  	,
CUSTOMER_SERVICE_REP          	,
CUSTOMER_SERVICE_TEAM         	,
ORDER_TYPE                    	,
BUSINESS_ENTITY_CODE          	,
CREATED_BY                    	,
CURRENCY_CODE                 	,
CUSTOMER_PO_DATE              	,
PAYMENT_TERMS                 	,
PAYMENT_TERMS_ID              	,
PRICE_LIST                    	,
PRICE_LIST_ID                 	,
REGIONAL_MANAGER_ID           	,
REGIONAL_MANAGER_EMAIL        	,
CONTROLLER_ID                 	,
CONTROLLER_EMAIL              	,
SALESREP_ID                   	,
SALESREP_EMAIL                	,
CCO_USER_ID                   	,
ACK_RECIPIENT                 	,
ACK_INDICATOR                 	,
ACK_DESTINATION               	,
ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_REFERENCE     	,
ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_SOURCE_CODE   	,
DISPLAY_STRING                	,
RMA_CSR                       	,
RMA_TEAM                      	,
DENIAL_REASON                 	,
CUST_RETURN_COMMENT           	,
HOLDER_EMAIL                  	,
SOURCE_HEADER_ID              	,
FOB_CODE                      	,
FREIGHT_CARRIER_CODE          	,
FREIGHT_TERMS_CODE            	,
RETURN_TYPE                   	,
SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE        	,
CSR_COMMENT                   	,
ACCESS_LEVEL                  	,
APPROVED_BY_TYPE              	,
QUERY_TYPE                    	,
CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE          	,
DWP_FLAG                      	,
PO_TYPE                       	,
CHANNEL_PARTNER_NAME          	,
RR_NUMBER                     	,
DATE_ORDERED                  	,
DOA_CASE_NUMBER               	,
DOA_SHIP_TO_NAME              	,
DOA_CONTACT_ADDRESS           	,
DOA_SERIAL_NUMBER             	,
ADDITIONAL_COMMENT            	,
GES_UPDATE_DATE               	,
GLOBAL_NAME                   	,
INVOICE_TO_CONTACT_FIRST_NAME 	,
REQUEST_NUMBER                	,
CREATION_DATE                 	,
STATUS                        	,
INVOICE_TO_CUSTOMER_ID        	,
INVOICE_TO_CUSTOMER           	,
INVOICE_TO_ADDRESS_ID         	,
INVOICE_TO_ADDRESS_LINE_1     	,
INVOICE_TO_ADDRESS_LINE_2     	,
INVOICE_TO_ADDRESS_LINE_3     	,
INVOICE_TO_ADDRESS_LINE_4     	,
INVOICE_TO_ADDRESS_CITY       	,
INVOICE_TO_ADDRESS_STATE      	,
INVOICE_TO_ADDRESS_ZIP        	,
INVOICE_TO_ADDRESS_COUNTY     	,
INVOICE_TO_ADDRESS_COUNTRY    	,
SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_ID           	,
SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER              	,
SHIP_TO_ADDRESS_ID            	,
SHIP_TO_ADDRESS_LINE_1        	,
SHIP_TO_ADDRESS_LINE_2        	,
SHIP_TO_ADDRESS_LINE_3        	,
SHIP_TO_ADDRESS_LINE_4        	,
SHIP_TO_ADDRESS_CITY          	,
SHIP_TO_ADDRESS_STATE         	,
SHIP_TO_ADDRESS_ZIP           	,
SHIP_TO_ADDRESS_COUNTY        	,
SHIP_TO_ADDRESS_COUNTRY       	,
ERP_RETURN_REASON             	,
WEB_RETURN_REASON             	,
INVOICE_TO_CONTACT_ID         	,
M_ROW$$                       	,
CREATE_DATETIME               	,
ACTION_CD                     
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CMRS_RMA_HEADERS SCRH
WHERE
NOT EXISTS
( 
 SELECT 1 FROM 
 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_V1_TV  NSOV1
 WHERE SCRH.REQUEST_NUMBER=NSOV1.SALES_ORDER_RMA_AA_NUM AND NSOV1.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00'
)
OR NOT EXISTS
(
 SELECT 1 FROM
 $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO
 WHERE SCRH.ORDER_NUMBER=NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT
)
OR NOT EXISTS
(
 SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLONLYDB.EL_CMRS_RMA_HEADERS_THIRD_L ECRL,
 $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP_FD
 WHERE (SCRH.REQUEST_NUMBER=ECRL.REQUEST_NUMBER AND SCRH.GLOBAL_NAME=ECRL.GLOBAL_NAME) AND
 (ECRL.FINANCE_DIRECTOR_EMAIL=NCWP_FD.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS)
)
OR NOT EXISTS
(
 SELECT 1 FROM
 $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP_RM
 WHERE (SCRH.REGIONAL_MANAGER_EMAIL=NCWP_RM.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS)
)
OR NOT EXISTS
(
 SELECT 1 FROM
 $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP_C
 WHERE  (SCRH.CONTROLLER_EMAIL=NCWP_C.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS)
)
)EXRMA
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY EXRMA.REQUEST_NUMBER  ORDER BY EXRMA.CREATION_DATE DESC)=1

SELECT
*
FROM
(
SELECT
DISTINCT SCRH.REQUEST_NUMBER              BK_AWAITING_AUTHORIZATION_NUM,
(CASE WHEN
NCWP_C.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY IS NOT NULL
OR 
NCWP_RM.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY IS NOT NULL
OR
NCWP_FD.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY IS NOT NULL
THEN 'Y'
ELSE 
'N'
END)                                 			RMA_REQUEST_APPROVAL_REQD_ROLE,
CREATION_DATE                        			RMA_REQUEST_SUBMIT_DTM,  
CAST(CREATION_DATE AS DATE)          			DV_RMA_REQUEST_SUBMIT_DT, 
RETURN_TYPE                          			RMA_REQUEST_TYPE_CD, 
STATUS                               			RMA_REQUEST_STATUS_CD,    
ACK_DESTINATION                      			RMA_REQUESTOR_EMAIL_ADDR,  
CCO_USER_ID                          			RMA_REQUESTOR_CCO_ID,   
COALESCE(NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-999)                  	ORIGINAL_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
CUST_RETURN_COMMENT                  			CUSTOMER_RETURN_CMT_TXT,
CSR_COMMENT                          			QUEUE_ADMIN_CMT_TXT,
COALESCE(WEB_RETURN_REASON,'UNKNOWN')                   BK_CUSTOMER_RETURN_REASON_CD,
COALESCE(NSOV1.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-9999)                			APPROVED_RMA_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
COALESCE(NCWP_C.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999)        	RU_APPRVR_AREA_CTRLR_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE(NCWP_RM.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999)       	RU_APPRVR_RGNL_MGR_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE(NCWP_FD.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999)       	RU_APPRVR_DIRECTOR_PRTY_KEY,
DENIAL_REASON                        			RU_RMA_REQ_DENIAL_REASON_CD,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)                 			EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER                                 			EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)                 			EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER                			EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I'  ACTION_CODE,
'I'  DML_TYPE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CMRS_RMA_HEADERS SCRH
LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$ETLONLYDB.EL_CMRS_RMA_HEADERS_THIRD_L ECRL
ON (SCRH.REQUEST_NUMBER = ECRL.REQUEST_NUMBER  AND SCRH.GLOBAL_NAME = ECRL.GLOBAL_NAME)
LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP_FD
 ON (ECRL.FINANCE_DIRECTOR_EMAIL=NCWP_FD.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP_RM
 ON (SCRH.REGIONAL_MANAGER_EMAIL=NCWP_RM.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP_C
 ON (SCRH.CONTROLLER_EMAIL=NCWP_C.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS)
LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_V1_TV  NSOV1
ON (SCRH.REQUEST_NUMBER=NSOV1.SALES_ORDER_RMA_AA_NUM) 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO
ON (SCRH.ORDER_NUMBER=NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT)
UNION ALL
SELECT
DISTINCT ECRH.REQUEST_NUMBER              BK_AWAITING_AUTHORIZATION_NUM,
(CASE WHEN
NCWP_C.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY IS NOT NULL
OR 
NCWP_RM.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY IS NOT NULL
OR
NCWP_FD.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY IS NOT NULL
THEN 'Y'
ELSE 
'N'
END)                                  			RMA_REQUEST_APPROVAL_REQD_ROLE,
CREATION_DATE                        			RMA_REQUEST_SUBMIT_DTM,  
CAST(CREATION_DATE AS DATE)          			DV_RMA_REQUEST_SUBMIT_DT, 
RETURN_TYPE                          			RMA_REQUEST_TYPE_CD, 
STATUS                               			RMA_REQUEST_STATUS_CD,    
ACK_DESTINATION                      			RMA_REQUESTOR_EMAIL_ADDR,  
CCO_USER_ID                          			RMA_REQUESTOR_CCO_ID,   
COALESCE(NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-999)                  	ORIGINAL_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
CUST_RETURN_COMMENT                  			CUSTOMER_RETURN_CMT_TXT,
CSR_COMMENT                          			QUEUE_ADMIN_CMT_TXT,
COALESCE(WEB_RETURN_REASON,'UNKNOWN')                   BK_CUSTOMER_RETURN_REASON_CD,
COALESCE(NSOV1.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-9999)              			APPROVED_RMA_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
COALESCE(NCWP_C.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999)        	RU_APPRVR_AREA_CTRLR_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE(NCWP_RM.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999)       	RU_APPRVR_RGNL_MGR_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE(NCWP_FD.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999)       	RU_APPRVR_DIRECTOR_PRTY_KEY,
DENIAL_REASON                        			RU_RMA_REQ_DENIAL_REASON_CD,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)                 			EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER                                			EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)                 			EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER               			                EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I'  ACTION_CODE,
'I'  DML_TYPE
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_CMRS_RMA_HEADERS ECRH
LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$ETLONLYDB.EL_CMRS_RMA_HEADERS_THIRD_L ECRL
ON (ECRH.REQUEST_NUMBER = ECRL.REQUEST_NUMBER  AND ECRH.GLOBAL_NAME = ECRL.GLOBAL_NAME)
LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP_FD
 ON (ECRL.FINANCE_DIRECTOR_EMAIL=NCWP_FD.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP_RM
 ON (ECRH.REGIONAL_MANAGER_EMAIL=NCWP_RM.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP_C
 ON (ECRH.CONTROLLER_EMAIL=NCWP_C.CISCO_EMAIL_ADDRESS)
LEFT OUTER  JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_V1_TV  NSOV1
ON (ECRH.REQUEST_NUMBER=NSOV1.SALES_ORDER_RMA_AA_NUM) 
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO
ON (ECRH.ORDER_NUMBER=NSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT)
)RMAH
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY RMAH.BK_AWAITING_AUTHORIZATION_NUM ORDER BY RMAH.RMA_REQUEST_SUBMIT_DTM DESC)=1
